nasb.text: and they shall fine him a hundred shekels of silver and give it to the girl’s father, because he publicly defamed a virgin of Israel. And she shall remain his wife; he cannot divorce her all his days.

esv.text: and they shall fine him a hundred shekels of silver and give them to the father of the young woman, because he has brought a bad name upon a virgin of Israel. And she shall be his wife. He may not divorce her all his days.

cnv.text: 罰他一千一百四十克銀子，交給那少女的父親，因為他破壞了一個以色列處女的名譽；那少女仍要作他的妻子，終生不能休她。

ccb.text: 罚他赔偿一公斤银子给女方的父亲，因为他诽谤了一个以色列的处女。那女子仍要做他妻子，丈夫终生不可休她。
